controls.control_objective: To ensure , with the approval of their boards, arrive at the prudential limits for borrowing/lending in call/notice money market in terms of guidelines given in
controls.control_description:
3.2 Banks/PDs/ Co-operative banks may, with the approval of their Boards, arrive at
the prudential limits for borrowing/lending in Call/Notice Money Market in terms of
guidelines given in paragraph 3.1 above.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , with the approval of their boards, arrive at the prudential limits for borrowing/lending in call/notice money market in terms of guidelines given in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be conveyed to the clearing corporation of india ltd
controls.control_description:
The limits so arrived at may be conveyed to
the Clearing Corporation of India Ltd.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be conveyed to the clearing corporation of india ltd

controls.control_objective: To ensure adopt the documentation suggested by fimmda from time to time
controls.control_description:
Documentation
Eligible participants may adopt the documentation suggested by FIMMDA from time
to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to adopt the documentation suggested by fimmda from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported within 15 minutes on nds-call reporting platform, irrespective of the size of the deal or whether the counterparty is a member of the nds-
controls.control_description:
8.3 OTC deals should be reported within 15 minutes on NDS-Call reporting platform,
irrespective of the size of the deal or whether the counterparty is a member of the
NDS-Call or not.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported within 15 minutes on nds-call reporting platform, irrespective of the size of the deal or whether the counterparty is a member of the nds-

controls.control_objective: To ensure be immediately brought to the notice of financial markets regulation department, reserve bank of india, central office, fort, mumbai either through e-
controls.control_description:
8.6 In case of any misreporting or repeated reporting of OTC deals by a party, the
same should be immediately brought to the notice of Financial Markets Regulation
Department, Reserve Bank of India, Central Office, Fort, Mumbai either through e-
mail or through fax (022-22702290).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be immediately brought to the notice of financial markets regulation department, reserve bank of india, central office, fort, mumbai either through e-

controls.control_objective: To ensure call for information in respect of money market transactions of eligible participants
controls.control_description:
8.7 In case the situation so warrants, the Reserve Bank may call for information in
respect of money market transactions of eligible participants.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to call for information in respect of money market transactions of eligible participants

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued as a 'stand-alone' product
controls.control_description: CP shall be issued as a 'stand-alone' product.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued as a 'stand-alone' product

controls.control_objective: To ensure , based on their commercial judgement
controls.control_description:
Banks and FIs may, based on their commercial judgement, subject to the
prudential norms as applicable to them, with the specific approval of their
respective Boards, choose to provide stand-by assistance/credit, back-stop
facility etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , based on their commercial judgement

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide unconditional and irrevocable guarantee for credit enhancement for cp issue provided: i
controls.control_description:
Non-bank entities (including corporates) may provide unconditional and
irrevocable guarantee for credit enhancement for CP issue provided:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide unconditional and irrevocable guarantee for credit enhancement for cp issue provided: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure at all times be within the limit as approved by its board of directors or the quantum indicated by the cra for the specified rating, whichever is lowe
controls.control_description:
The aggregate amount of CP that can be issued by an issuer shall at all times
be within the limit as approved by its Board of Directors or the quantum
indicated by the CRA for the specified rating, whichever is lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to at all times be within the limit as approved by its board of directors or the quantum indicated by the cra for the specified rating, whichever is lowe

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the flexibility to fix working capital limits, duly taking into account the resource pattern of company's financing, including cp
controls.control_description:
Banks and FIs shall have the flexibility to fix working capital limits, duly taking
into account the resource pattern of company's financing, including CP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the flexibility to fix working capital limits, duly taking into account the resource pattern of company's financing, including cp

controls.control_objective: To ensure be within the overall umbrella limit prescribed in the master circular/direction on resource raising norms for fis, issued by the department of bankin
controls.control_description:
An issue of CP by an FI shall be within the overall umbrella limit prescribed in
the Master Circular/Direction on Resource Raising Norms for FIs, issued by the
Department of Banking Regulation, Reserve Bank of India,
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be within the overall umbrella limit prescribed in the master circular/direction on resource raising norms for fis, issued by the department of bankin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be raised within a period of two weeks from the date on which the issuer opens the issue for subscription
controls.control_description:
The total amount of CP proposed to be issued should be raised within a period
of two weeks from the date on which the issuer opens the issue for
subscription.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be raised within a period of two weeks from the date on which the issuer opens the issue for subscription

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same maturity date
controls.control_description:
CP may be issued on a single date or in parts on different dates
provided that in the latter case, each CP shall have the same maturity date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same maturity date

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a fresh issue
controls.control_description: Every issue of CP, and every renewal of a CP, shall be treated as a fresh issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as a fresh issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to invest in cp
controls.control_description:
Individuals, banks, other corporate bodies (registered or incorporated in India)
and unincorporated bodies, Non-Resident Indians and Foreign Institutional
Investors (FIIs) shall be eligible to invest in CP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to invest in cp

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to invest in cps subject to (i) such conditions as may be set for them by the securities and exchange board of india (sebi)
controls.control_description:
FIIs shall be eligible to invest in CPs subject to (i) such conditions as may be
set for them by the Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to invest in cps subject to (i) such conditions as may be set for them by the securities and exchange board of india (sebi)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued in the form of a promissory note (as specified in annex iii to this direction) and held in physical form or in a dematerialized form through any of the depositories approved by and registered with sebi
controls.control_description:
CP shall be issued in the form of a promissory note (as specified in Annex
III to this Direction) and held in physical form or in a dematerialized form
through any of the depositories approved by and registered with SEBI,
provided that all RBI regulated entities can deal in and hold CP only in
dematerialised form through such depositories.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued in the form of a promissory note (as specified in annex iii to this direction) and held in physical form or in a dematerialized form through any of the depositories approved by and registered with sebi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be only in dematerialised form
controls.control_description:
Fresh investments by all RBI-regulated entities shall be only in dematerialised
form.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be only in dematerialised form

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued in denominations of rs
controls.control_description: CP shall be issued in denominations of Rs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued in denominations of rs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than rs
controls.control_description:
The
amount invested by a single investor should not be less than Rs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than rs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued at a discount to face value as may be determined by the issuer
controls.control_description:
CP shall be issued at a discount to face value as may be determined by the
issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued at a discount to face value as may be determined by the issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the issue of cp underwritten or co-accepted
controls.control_description: No issuer shall have the issue of CP underwritten or co-accepted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the issue of cp underwritten or co-accepted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued for maturities between a minimum of 7 days and a maximum of up to one year from the date of issue
controls.control_description:
CP shall be issued for maturities between a minimum of 7 days and a
maximum of up to one year from the date of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued for maturities between a minimum of 7 days and a maximum of up to one year from the date of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure go beyond the date up to which the credit rating of the issuer is valid
controls.control_description:
The maturity date of the CP shall not go beyond the date up to which the
credit rating of the issuer is valid.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to go beyond the date up to which the credit rating of the issuer is valid

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint an ipa for issuance of cp
controls.control_description: Every issuer must appoint an IPA for issuance of CP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint an ipa for issuance of cp

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose to the potential investors, its latest financial position as per the standard market practice
controls.control_description:
The issuer should disclose to the potential investors, its latest financial
position as per the standard market practice.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose to the potential investors, its latest financial position as per the standard market practice

controls.control_objective: To ensure arrange for crediting the cp to the demat account of the investor with the depository through the ipa
controls.control_description:
After the exchange of confirmation of the deal between the investor and the
issuer, the issuer shall arrange for crediting the CP to the Demat account of
the investor with the depository through the IPA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to arrange for crediting the cp to the demat account of the investor with the depository through the ipa

controls.control_objective: To ensure give to the investor a copy of ipa certificate to the effect that the issuer has a valid agreement with the ipa and documents are in order (annex iv)
controls.control_description:
The issuer shall give to the investor a copy of IPA certificate to the effect that
the issuer has a valid agreement with the IPA and documents are in order
(Annex IV).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to give to the investor a copy of ipa certificate to the effect that the issuer has a valid agreement with the ipa and documents are in order (annex iv)

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain credit rating for issuance of cp from any one of the sebi registered cras
controls.control_description:
5.4 Rating Requirement
Eligible participants/issuers shall obtain credit rating for issuance of CP from any one
of the SEBI registered CRAs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain credit rating for issuance of cp from any one of the sebi registered cras

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 'a3' as per rating symbol and definition prescribed by sebi
controls.control_description:
The minimum credit rating shall be 'A3' as per rating
symbol and definition prescribed by SEBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 'a3' as per rating symbol and definition prescribed by sebi

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure at the time of issuance of the cp that the rating so obtained is current and has not fallen due for review
controls.control_description:
The issuers shall ensure at the time of
issuance of the CP that the rating so obtained is current and has not fallen due for
review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure at the time of issuance of the cp that the rating so obtained is current and has not fallen due for review

controls.control_objective: To ensure pay the discounted value of the cp to the account of the issuer through the ipa
controls.control_description:
The investor in CP (primary subscriber) shall pay the discounted value of the
CP to the account of the issuer through the IPA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to pay the discounted value of the cp to the account of the issuer through the ipa

controls.control_objective: To ensure get the cp redeemed and
controls.control_description: The holder of a CP in dematerialised form shall get the CP redeemed and
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to get the cp redeemed and

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the operational guidelines issued by fimmda, from time to time, with the approval of rbi
controls.control_description:
Issuers/IPAs shall follow the operational guidelines issued by FIMMDA, from
time to time, with the approval of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to follow the operational guidelines issued by fimmda, from time to time, with the approval of rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported within 15 minutes of the trade to the financial market trade reporting and confirmation platform ("f-trac") of clearcorp dealing system (i
controls.control_description:
All OTC trades in CP shall be reported within 15 minutes of the trade to the
Financial Market Trade Reporting and Confirmation Platform ("F-TRAC") of
Clearcorp Dealing System (India) Ltd.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported within 15 minutes of the trade to the financial market trade reporting and confirmation platform ("f-trac") of clearcorp dealing system (i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable
controls.control_description:
Participants adhering to the extant laws such as stamp duty as may be
applicable;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure be settled through the clearing house of the national stock exchange (nse), i
controls.control_description:
OTC trades in CP shall be settled through the clearing house of the National
Stock Exchange (NSE), i.e., the National Securities Clearing Corporation
Limited (NSCCL), the clearing house of the Bombay Stock Exchange (BSE),
i.e., Indian Clearing Corporation Limited (ICCL), and the clearing house of the
MCX-Stock Exchange, i.e., MCX-SX Clearing Corporation Limited (CCL), as
per the norms specified by NSCCL, ICCL and CCL from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be settled through the clearing house of the national stock exchange (nse), i

controls.control_objective: To ensure either be t+0 or t+1
controls.control_description: The settlement cycle for OTC trades in CP shall either be T+0 or T+1.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to either be t+0 or t+1

controls.control_objective: To ensure buyback the cp, issued by them to the investors, before maturity
controls.control_description: Issuers may buyback the CP, issued by them to the investors, before maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to buyback the cp, issued by them to the investors, before maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be through the secondary market and at prevailing market price
controls.control_description:
Buyback of CP shall be through the secondary market and at prevailing
market price.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be through the secondary market and at prevailing market price

controls.control_objective: To ensure be bought back before a minimum period of 7 days from the date of issue
controls.control_description:
The CP shall not be bought back before a minimum period of 7 days from the
date of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be bought back before a minimum period of 7 days from the date of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure intimate the ipa of the buyback undertaken
controls.control_description: Issuer shall intimate the IPA of the buyback undertaken.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to intimate the ipa of the buyback undertaken

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undertaken after taking approval from the board of directors
controls.control_description:
Buyback of CPs should be undertaken after taking approval from the Board of
Directors.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken after taking approval from the board of directors

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the guidelines and procedures laid down for the issuance of cp are strictly adhered to
controls.control_description:
Issuer
The issuer shall ensure that the guidelines and procedures laid down for the
issuance of CP are strictly adhered to.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to ensure that the guidelines and procedures laid down for the issuance of cp are strictly adhered to

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the issuer has the minimum credit rating as stipulated by rbi and the amount mobilised through issuance of cp is within the quantum indica
controls.control_description:
The IPA shall ensure that the issuer has the minimum credit rating as
stipulated by RBI and the amount mobilised through issuance of CP is within
the quantum indicated by CRA for the specified rating or as approved by its
Board of Directors, whichever is lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the issuer has the minimum credit rating as stipulated by rbi and the amount mobilised through issuance of cp is within the quantum indica

controls.control_objective: To ensure certify that it has a valid agreement with the issuer (annex iv)
controls.control_description: The IPA shall certify that it has a valid agreement with the issuer (Annex IV).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to certify that it has a valid agreement with the issuer (annex iv)

controls.control_objective: To ensure verify that all the documents submitted by the issuer, viz
controls.control_description:
The IPA shall verify that all the documents submitted by the issuer, viz., copy
of board resolution, signatures of authorised executants (when CP is issued in
physical form) are in order and shall issue a certificate to this effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to verify that all the documents submitted by the issuer, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be held in the custody of ipa
controls.control_description:
Certified copies of original documents, verified by the IPA, shall be held in the
custody of IPA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be held in the custody of ipa

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the details of issuance of cp on the online returns filing system (orfs) module of the rbi within two days from the date of issuance of the cp
controls.control_description:
All scheduled banks, acting as IPAs, shall report the details of issuance of CP
on the Online Returns Filing System (ORFS) module of the RBI within two
days from the date of issuance of the CP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the details of issuance of cp on the online returns filing system (orfs) module of the rbi within two days from the date of issuance of the cp

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately report, on occurrence, full particulars of defaults in repayment of cp to the chief general manager, financial markets regulation departme
controls.control_description:
IPAs, shall immediately report, on occurrence, full particulars of defaults in
repayment of CP to the Chief General Manager, Financial Markets Regulation
Department, Reserve Bank of India, Central Office, Fort, Mumbai-400 001
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to immediately report, on occurrence, full particulars of defaults in repayment of cp to the chief general manager, financial markets regulation departme

controls.control_objective: To ensure also report all instances of buyback of cps undertaken by the issuer to the chief general manager, financial markets regulation department, reserve ba
controls.control_description:
IPAs shall also report all instances of buyback of CPs undertaken by the
issuer to the Chief General Manager, Financial Markets Regulation
Department, Reserve Bank of India, Central Office, Fort, Mumbai-400 001
(email) in the format as given in Annex VI of this Direction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also report all instances of buyback of cps undertaken by the issuer to the chief general manager, financial markets regulation department, reserve ba

controls.control_objective: To ensure abide by the code of conduct prescribed by the sebi for cras for undertaking rating of capital market instruments, which shall be applicable for ratin
controls.control_description:
CRAs shall abide by the Code of Conduct prescribed by the SEBI for CRAs
for undertaking rating of capital market instruments, which shall be applicable
for rating CPs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to abide by the code of conduct prescribed by the sebi for cras for undertaking rating of capital market instruments, which shall be applicable for ratin

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the discretion to determine the validity period of the rating depending upon their perception about the strength of the issuer
controls.control_description:
The CRAs shall have the discretion to determine the validity period of the
rating depending upon their perception about the strength of the issuer;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the discretion to determine the validity period of the rating depending upon their perception about the strength of the issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at the time of rating, clearly indicate the date when the rating is due for review
controls.control_description:
and
they shall, at the time of rating, clearly indicate the date when the rating is due
for review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at the time of rating, clearly indicate the date when the rating is due for review

controls.control_objective: To ensure closely monitor the rating assigned to issuers vis-à-vis their track record at regular intervals and shall make their revision in the ratings public t
controls.control_description:
The CRAs shall closely monitor the rating assigned to issuers vis-à-vis their
track record at regular intervals and shall make their revision in the ratings
public through their publications and website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to closely monitor the rating assigned to issuers vis-à-vis their track record at regular intervals and shall make their revision in the ratings public t

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the acceptance of deposit by issuance of cp, by any nbfc in accordance with these guidelines
controls.control_description:
Non-applicability of Certain Other Directions
Nothing contained in the Non-Banking Financial Companies Acceptance of Public
Deposits (Reserve Bank) Directions, 1998 shall apply to the acceptance of deposit
by issuance of CP, by any NBFC in accordance with these guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to apply to the acceptance of deposit by issuance of cp, by any nbfc in accordance with these guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be rs
controls.control_description:
Minimum Size of Issue and Denominations
Minimum amount of a CD should be Rs.1 lakh, i.e., the minimum deposit that could
be accepted from a single subscriber should not be less than Rs.1 lakh, and in
multiples of Rs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be rs

controls.control_objective: To ensure also subscribe to cds, but only on non-repatriable basis, which should be clearly stated on the certificate
controls.control_description:
Non-Resident Indians (NRIs) may also
subscribe to CDs, but only on non-repatriable basis, which should be clearly stated
on the Certificate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also subscribe to cds, but only on non-repatriable basis, which should be clearly stated on the certificate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than 7 days and not more than one year, from the date of issue
controls.control_description:
6.1 The maturity period of CDs issued by banks should not be less than 7 days and
not more than one year, from the date of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than 7 days and not more than one year, from the date of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued at a discount on face value
controls.control_description:
Discount / Coupon Rate
CDs may be issued at a discount on face value.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued at a discount on face value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clearly informed of the same
controls.control_description:
The investor should be clearly
informed of the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clearly informed of the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure necessarily be cleared and settled under dvp i mechanism through the authorised clearing houses {national securities clearing corporation limited (nsc
controls.control_description:
Settlement
All OTC trades in CDs shall necessarily be cleared and settled under DVP I
mechanism through the authorised clearing houses {National Securities Clearing
Corporation Limited (NSCCL), Indian Clearing Corporation Limited (ICCL) and MCX
Stock Exchange Clearing Corporation Limited (CCL)} of the stock exchanges.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to necessarily be cleared and settled under dvp i mechanism through the authorised clearing houses {national securities clearing corporation limited (nsc

controls.control_objective: To ensure relax these restrictions for temporary periods through a separate notification
controls.control_description:
However, the RBI may relax these restrictions for
temporary periods through a separate notification.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to relax these restrictions for temporary periods through a separate notification

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue cds only in dematerialised form
controls.control_description:
Format of CDs
Banks / FIs should issue CDs only in dematerialised form.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue cds only in dematerialised form

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform the chief general manager, financial markets regulation department, reserve bank of india, central office, fort, mumbai - 400 001 about such in
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, if an investor insists on physical certificate, the bank / FI may inform the
Chief General Manager, Financial Markets Regulation Department, Reserve Bank of
India, Central Office, Fort, Mumbai - 400 001 about such instances separately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform the chief general manager, financial markets regulation department, reserve bank of india, central office, fort, mumbai - 400 001 about such in

controls.control_objective: To ensure make payment on the immediate preceding working day
controls.control_description:
If the
maturity date happens to be a holiday, the issuing bank / FI should make payment
on the immediate preceding working day.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make payment on the immediate preceding working day

controls.control_objective: To ensure fix the period of deposit in such a manner that the maturity date does not coincide with a holiday to avoid loss of discount / interest rate
controls.control_description:
Banks / FIs, therefore, should fix the period
of deposit in such a manner that the maturity date does not coincide with a holiday to
avoid loss of discount / interest rate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fix the period of deposit in such a manner that the maturity date does not coincide with a holiday to avoid loss of discount / interest rate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be signed by two or more authorised signatories
controls.control_description: They should be signed by two or more authorised signatories.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be signed by two or more authorised signatories

controls.control_objective: To ensure be presented for payment by the last holder
controls.control_description:
15.1 Since CDs are transferable, the physical certificates may be presented for
payment by the last holder.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be presented for payment by the last holder

controls.control_objective: To ensure arise
controls.control_description:
The question of liability on account of any defect in the
chain of endorsements may arise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to arise

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be suitably cautioned
controls.control_description:
Those who
deal in these CDs may also be suitably cautioned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be suitably cautioned

controls.control_objective: To ensure also communicate to the issuer by a letter / fax enclosing the copy of the delivery instruction they had given to their respective dp and intimate the
controls.control_description:
The holders should also
communicate to the issuer by a letter / fax enclosing the copy of the delivery
instruction they had given to their respective DP and intimate the place at which the
payment is requested to facilitate prompt payment.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also communicate to the issuer by a letter / fax enclosing the copy of the delivery instruction they had given to their respective dp and intimate the

controls.control_objective: To ensure to be given in at least one local newspaper
controls.control_description: Notice is required to be given in at least one local newspaper;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to be given in at least one local newspaper

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued only in physical form
controls.control_description: 16.2 The duplicate certificate should be issued only in physical form.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued only in physical form

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly state that the cd is a duplicate one stating the original value date, due date, and the date of issue (as "duplicate issued on ________")
controls.control_description:
The duplicate CD should clearly state that the CD is a Duplicate one stating the
original value date, due date, and the date of issue (as "Duplicate issued on
________").
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly state that the cd is a duplicate one stating the original value date, due date, and the date of issue (as "duplicate issued on ________")

controls.control_objective: To ensure account the issue price under the head "cds issued" and show it under deposits
controls.control_description:
Accounting
Banks / FIs may account the issue price under the Head "CDs issued" and show it
under deposits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to account the issue price under the head "cds issued" and show it under deposits

controls.control_objective: To ensure maintain a register of cds issued with complete particulars
controls.control_description:
Banks / FIs should maintain a register of CDs issued with
complete particulars.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to maintain a register of cds issued with complete particulars

controls.control_objective: To ensure prescribe, in consultation with the rbi, for operational flexibility and smooth functioning of the cd market, any standardised procedure and documenta
controls.control_description:
Standardised Market Practices and Documentation
Fixed Income Money Market and Derivatives Association of India (FIMMDA) may
prescribe, in consultation with the RBI, for operational flexibility and smooth
functioning of the CD market, any standardised procedure and documentation that
are to be followed by the participants, in consonance with the international best
practices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to prescribe, in consultation with the rbi, for operational flexibility and smooth functioning of the cd market, any standardised procedure and documenta

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the handbook of market practices issued by
controls.control_description: Banks / FIs may refer to the Handbook of Market Practices issued by
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to the handbook of market practices issued by

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the amount of cds in the fortnightly return under section 42 of the rbi act, 1934 and also separately indicate the amount so included by way o
controls.control_description:
19.1 Banks should include the amount of CDs in the fortnightly return under Section
42 of the RBI Act, 1934 and also separately indicate the amount so included by way
of a footnote in the return.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include the amount of cds in the fortnightly return under section 42 of the rbi act, 1934 and also separately indicate the amount so included by way o

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the data on issuance of cds on the web- based module under the online returns filing system (orfs) within 10 days from the end of the fortnight
controls.control_description:
19.2 Further, banks / FIs should report the data on issuance of CDs on the web-
based module under the Online Returns Filing System (ORFS) within 10 days from
the end of the fortnight to which it pertains.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the data on issuance of cds on the web- based module under the online returns filing system (orfs) within 10 days from the end of the fortnight

controls.control_objective: To ensure a debt instrument issued by a corporate (including nbfcs) with original or initial maturity up to one year and issued by way of private placement
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a debt instrument issued by a corporate (including nbfcs) with original or initial maturity up to one year and issued by way of private placement

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company as defined in the companies act, 2013 (including nbfcs) and a corporation established by an act of any legislature
controls.control_description:
"Corporate" means a company as defined in the Companies Act, 2013
(including NBFCs) and a corporation established by an act of any Legislature.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company as defined in the companies act, 2013 (including nbfcs) and a corporation established by an act of any legislature

controls.control_objective: To ensure also adhere to the directions/guidelines issued by the department of non-banking regulation, reserve bank of india
controls.control_description:
NBFCs shall also adhere to the directions/guidelines issued by the
Department of Non-Banking Regulation, Reserve Bank of India
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also adhere to the directions/guidelines issued by the department of non-banking regulation, reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to issue ncds if it fulfills the following criteria, namely, i
controls.control_description:
Eligibility to issue NCDs
A corporate shall be eligible to issue NCDs if it fulfills the following criteria, namely,
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to issue ncds if it fulfills the following criteria, namely, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to non-banking financial companies (nbfcs) including primary dealers (pds)
controls.control_description:
However, paragraph 2 (i) above shall not be applicable to Non-Banking Financial
Companies (NBFCs) including Primary Dealers (PDs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to non-banking financial companies (nbfcs) including primary dealers (pds)

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain credit rating for issuance of the ncds from one of the rating agencies, viz
controls.control_description:
3.1 An eligible corporate intending to issue NCDs shall obtain credit rating for
issuance of the NCDs from one of the rating agencies, viz., the Credit Rating
Information Services of India Ltd.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain credit rating for issuance of the ncds from one of the rating agencies, viz

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by the reserve bank of india from time to time, for the purpose
controls.control_description:
Ltd or such other agencies registered with Securities
and Exchange Board of India (SEBI) or such other credit rating agencies as may be
specified by the Reserve Bank of India from time to time, for the purpose.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by the reserve bank of india from time to time, for the purpose

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 'a2' as per rating symbol and definition prescribed by sebi
controls.control_description:
3.2 The minimum credit rating shall be 'A2' as per rating symbol and definition
prescribed by SEBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 'a2' as per rating symbol and definition prescribed by sebi

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure at the time of issuance of ncds that the rating so obtained is current and has not fallen due for review
controls.control_description:
3.3 The Corporate shall ensure at the time of issuance of NCDs that the rating so
obtained is current and has not fallen due for review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure at the time of issuance of ncds that the rating so obtained is current and has not fallen due for review

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued for maturities of less than 90 days from the date of issue
controls.control_description:
4.1 NCDs shall not be issued for maturities of less than 90 days from the date of
issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued for maturities of less than 90 days from the date of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure fall within the period of 90 days from the date of issue
controls.control_description:
4.2 The exercise date of option (put/call), if any, attached to the NCDs shall not fall
within the period of 90 days from the date of issue.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to fall within the period of 90 days from the date of issue

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed the validity period of the credit rating of the instrument
controls.control_description:
4.3 The tenor of the NCDs shall not exceed the validity period of the credit rating of
the instrument.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed the validity period of the credit rating of the instrument

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued in denominations with a minimum of rs
controls.control_description:
Denomination
NCDs may be issued in denominations with a minimum of Rs.5 lakh (face value) and
in multiples of Rs.1 lakh.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued in denominations with a minimum of rs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be within such limit as may be approved by the board of directors of the corporate or the quantum indicated by the credit rating agency for the rating
controls.control_description:
6.1 The aggregate amount of NCDs issued by a corporate shall be within such limit
as may be approved by the Board of Directors of the corporate or the quantum
indicated by the Credit Rating Agency for the rating granted, whichever is lower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be within such limit as may be approved by the board of directors of the corporate or the quantum indicated by the credit rating agency for the rating

controls.control_objective: To ensure be completed within a period of two weeks from the date on which the corporate opens the issue for subscription
controls.control_description:
6.2 The total amount of NCDs proposed to be issued shall be completed within a
period of two weeks from the date on which the corporate opens the issue for
subscription.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be completed within a period of two weeks from the date on which the corporate opens the issue for subscription

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose to the prospective investors, its financial position as per the standard market practice
controls.control_description:
7.1 The corporate shall disclose to the prospective investors, its financial position as
per the standard market practice.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose to the prospective investors, its financial position as per the standard market practice

controls.control_objective: To ensure certify to the investors that all the eligibility conditions set forth in these directions for the issue of ncds are met by the corporate
controls.control_description:
7.2 The auditors of the corporate shall certify to the investors that all the eligibility
conditions set forth in these directions for the issue of NCDs are met by the
corporate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to certify to the investors that all the eligibility conditions set forth in these directions for the issue of ncds are met by the corporate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be complied with by the corporate
controls.control_description:
7.3 The requirements of all the provisions of the Companies Act, 1956 and the
Securities and Exchange Board of India (Issue and Listing of Debt Securities)
Regulations, 2008, or any other law, that may be applicable, shall be complied with
by the corporate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be complied with by the corporate

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued within the period prescribed in the companies act, 1956 or any other law as in force at the time of issuance
controls.control_description:
7.4 The Debenture Certificate shall be issued within the period prescribed in the
Companies Act, 1956 or any other law as in force at the time of issuance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued within the period prescribed in the companies act, 1956 or any other law as in force at the time of issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued at face value carrying a coupon rate or at a discount to face value as zero coupon instruments as determined by the corporate
controls.control_description:
7.5 NCDs may be issued at face value carrying a coupon rate or at a discount to
face value as zero coupon instruments as determined by the corporate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued at face value carrying a coupon rate or at a discount to face value as zero coupon instruments as determined by the corporate

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint a debenture trustee (dt) for each issuance of the ncds
controls.control_description:
8.1 Every corporate issuing NCDs shall appoint a Debenture Trustee (DT) for each
issuance of the NCDs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint a debenture trustee (dt) for each issuance of the ncds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to act as dt for issue of the ncds only
controls.control_description:
8.2 Any entity that is registered as a DT with the SEBI under SEBI (Debenture
Trustees) Regulations, 1993, shall be eligible to act as DT for issue of the NCDs only
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to act as dt for issue of the ncds only

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit to the reserve bank of india such information as required by it from time to time
controls.control_description:
8.3 The DT shall submit to the Reserve Bank of India such information as required
by it from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit to the reserve bank of india such information as required by it from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure be issued to and held by individuals, banks, primary dealers (pds), other corporate bodies including insurance companies and mutual funds registered o
controls.control_description:
9.1 NCDs may be issued to and held by individuals, banks, Primary Dealers (PDs),
other corporate bodies including insurance companies and mutual funds registered
or incorporated in India and unincorporated bodies, Non-Resident Indians (NRIs)
and Foreign Institutional Investors (FIIs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be issued to and held by individuals, banks, primary dealers (pds), other corporate bodies including insurance companies and mutual funds registered o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the approval of the respective statutes governing them, and approval of their respective regulators
controls.control_description:
9.2 Investments in NCDs by Banks/PDs shall be subject to the approval of the
respective statutes governing them, and approval of their respective regulators.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the approval of the respective statutes governing them, and approval of their respective regulators

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to extant provisions of the foreign exchange management act (fema) and rules, regulations, notifications, directions or orders issued there
controls.control_description:
9.3 Investments by the FIIs shall be subject to extant provisions of the Foreign
Exchange Management Act (FEMA) and rules, regulations, notifications, directions
or orders issued thereunder, and within such limits as may be set forth in this regard
from time to time by SEBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to extant provisions of the foreign exchange management act (fema) and rules, regulations, notifications, directions or orders issued there

controls.control_objective: To ensure to make fresh investments in ncds only in dematerialised form
controls.control_description:
However, banks, FIs and PDs are required to make fresh
investments in NCDs only in dematerialised form.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to make fresh investments in ncds only in dematerialised form

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the guidelines and procedures laid down for issuance of ncd are strictly adhered to
controls.control_description:
11.2 Corporates shall ensure that the guidelines and procedures laid down for
issuance of NCD are strictly adhered to.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to ensure that the guidelines and procedures laid down for issuance of ncd are strictly adhered to

controls.control_objective: To ensure be guided by these regulations, the securities and exchange board of india (debenture trustees) regulations,1993, the trust deed and offer document
controls.control_description:
11.3 The roles, responsibilities, duties and functions of the DTs shall be guided by
these regulations, the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Debenture Trustees)
Regulations,1993, the trust deed and offer document.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by these regulations, the securities and exchange board of india (debenture trustees) regulations,1993, the trust deed and offer document

controls.control_objective: To ensure report, within three days from the date of completion of the issue, the issuance details to the chief general manager, financial markets regulation
controls.control_description:
11.4 The DTs shall report, within three days from the date of completion of the issue,
the issuance details to the Chief General Manager, Financial Markets Regulation
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report, within three days from the date of completion of the issue, the issuance details to the chief general manager, financial markets regulation

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit to the reserve bank of india (on a quarterly basis) a report on the outstanding amount of ncds of maturity up to year
controls.control_description:
11.5 DTs should submit to the Reserve Bank of India (on a quarterly basis) a report
on the outstanding amount of NCDs of maturity up to year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit to the reserve bank of india (on a quarterly basis) a report on the outstanding amount of ncds of maturity up to year

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the information called for under para 10
controls.control_description:
11.7 The DTs shall report the information called for under para 10.4, 10.5 and 10.6
of these Directions as per the format notified by the Reserve Bank of India, Financial
Markets Regulation Department, Central Office, Mumbai from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the information called for under para 10

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to them (cras) for rating the ncds
controls.control_description:
11.8 Code of Conduct prescribed by the SEBI for the CRAs for undertaking rating of
capital market instruments shall be applicable to them (CRAs) for rating the NCDs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to them (cras) for rating the ncds

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the discretion to determine the validity period of the rating depending upon its perception about the strength of the issuer
controls.control_description:
11.9 The CRA shall have the discretion to determine the validity period of the rating
depending upon its perception about the strength of the issuer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the discretion to determine the validity period of the rating depending upon its perception about the strength of the issuer

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at the time of rating, clearly indicate the date when the rating is due for review
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, CRA
shall, at the time of rating, clearly indicate the date when the rating is due for review.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at the time of rating, clearly indicate the date when the rating is due for review

controls.control_objective: To ensure closely monitor the rating assigned to corporates vis-à-vis their track record at regular intervals and make their revision in the ratings public thro
controls.control_description:
11.10 While the CRAs may decide the validity period of credit rating, they shall
closely monitor the rating assigned to corporates vis-à-vis their track record at
regular intervals and make their revision in the ratings public through their
publications and website.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to closely monitor the rating assigned to corporates vis-à-vis their track record at regular intervals and make their revision in the ratings public thro

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the disclosure document brought out by the fixed income money market and derivatives association of india (fimmda), in consultation with the re
controls.control_description:
12.1 Issuers of NCDs of maturity up to one year shall follow the Disclosure
Document brought out by the Fixed Income Money Market and Derivatives
Association of India (FIMMDA), in consultation with the Reserve Bank of India as
amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow the disclosure document brought out by the fixed income money market and derivatives association of india (fimmda), in consultation with the re

controls.control_objective: To ensure the reserve bank of india
controls.control_description: 'RBI' means the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the reserve bank of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure deals in overnight funds
controls.control_description: "Call Money" means deals in overnight funds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deals in overnight funds

controls.control_objective: To ensure deals in funds for 2 - 14 days
controls.control_description: "Notice Money" means deals in funds for 2 - 14 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deals in funds for 2 - 14 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure deals in funds for 15 days-1 year
controls.control_description: "Term Money" means deals in funds for 15 days-1 year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to deals in funds for 15 days-1 year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be on a reporting friday basis and would mean the period from saturday to the second following friday, both days inclusive
controls.control_description:
"Fortnight" shall be on a reporting Friday basis and would mean the period
from Saturday to the second following Friday, both days inclusive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be on a reporting friday basis and would mean the period from saturday to the second following friday, both days inclusive

controls.control_objective: To ensure a banking company as defined in clause
controls.control_description: "Bank" or "Banking company" means a banking company as defined in clause
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a banking company as defined in clause

controls.control_objective: To ensure a bank included in the second schedule of the reserve bank of india act, 1934
controls.control_description:
"Scheduled bank" means a bank included in the Second Schedule of the
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a bank included in the second schedule of the reserve bank of india act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure a financial institution which holds a valid letter of authorisation as a pd issued by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
"Primary Dealer (PD)" means a financial institution which holds a valid letter of
authorisation as a PD issued by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a financial institution which holds a valid letter of authorisation as a pd issued by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company as defined in the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description: 'Company' means a company as defined in the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company as defined in the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure a scheduled bank acting as an ipa
controls.control_description: 'Issuing and Paying Agent (IPA)' means a Scheduled Bank acting as an IPA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a scheduled bank acting as an ipa

controls.control_objective: To ensure a credit rating agency registered with securities and exchange board of india
controls.control_description:
'CRA' means a Credit Rating Agency registered with Securities and Exchange
Board of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a credit rating agency registered with securities and exchange board of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company other than banking company
controls.control_description: "Non-banking Company" means a company other than banking company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company other than banking company

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company as defined in section 45 i (f) of the reserve bank of india act, 1934
controls.control_description:
"Non-banking financial company" means a company as defined in Section 45
I (f) of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company as defined in section 45 i (f) of the reserve bank of india act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure the sum of tier i and tier ii capital as disclosed in the latest audited balance sheet of the entity
controls.control_description:
"Capital Funds" means the sum of Tier I and Tier II capital as disclosed in the
latest audited balance sheet of the entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the sum of tier i and tier ii capital as disclosed in the latest audited balance sheet of the entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them in the said act
controls.control_description:
This Master Direction has been superseded
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 shall have the same meaning as assigned to
them in the said Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them in the said act

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made on the immediate preceding working day) for value received ____________________________ hereby (name of the issuing company/institution) promi
controls.control_description:
(If such date happens to fall on a holiday, payment shall be made on the immediate
preceding working day)
For value received ____________________________ hereby
(NAME OF THE ISSUING COMPANY/INSTITUTION)
Promises to pay __________________________________or order on the
(NAME OF THE INVESTOR)
maturity date as specified above the sum of Rs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made on the immediate preceding working day) for value received ____________________________ hereby (name of the issuing company/institution) promi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be clean and distinct
controls.control_description:
(NAME OF THE ISSUNG AND PAYING AGENT)
For and on behalf of
____________________________________________________
(NAME OF THE ISSUING COMPANY / INSTITUTION)
(AUTHORISED SIGNATORY / SIGNATORIES)
ALL ENDORSEMENTS UPON THIS COMMERCIAL PAPER MUST BE CLEAN
AND DISTINCT.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be clean and distinct

controls.control_objective: To ensure be written within the space allotted
controls.control_description:
EACH ENDORSEMENT SHOULD BE WRITTEN WITHIN THE
SPACE ALLOTTED.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be written within the space allotted

controls.control_objective: To ensure 8, 2001
controls.control_description:
MPD.3173/03.09.01/2000-01 dated
Participation in Call/Notice Money Market
May 8, 2001
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 8, 2001

controls.control_objective: To ensure 25, 2001 market and bills rediscounting scheme - primary dealers
controls.control_description:
This Master Direction has been superseded
/2000-01 dated May 25, 2001
Market and Bills Rediscounting Scheme - Primary
Dealers
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 25, 2001 market and bills rediscounting scheme - primary dealers

controls.control_objective: To ensure 25, 2004
controls.control_description:
MPD.BC.250/07.01.279/2003-04
Moving towards Pure Inter-bank Call/Notice Money Market
dated May 25, 2004
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 25, 2004

controls.control_objective: To ensure 23, 1990 certificates of deposit (cds) 3
controls.control_description:
DBOD.No.BP.BC.112/65-90 May 23, 1990 Certificates of Deposit (CDs)
3.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 23, 1990 certificates of deposit (cds) 3
